narrative:
Precinct Pleasant East (precinct in Van Wert County) has 430 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 49.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 41.2 percentage points.
